exploration_notes: Found all 6 files comprising the security provider registration framework. `java.security.Provider` is the base class defining `putService()` (line 1221) for registering algorithm services. Four concrete providers extend it: `Sun` (core algorithms like SHA/DSA), `SunJCE` (JCE crypto algorithms like AES/DES), `SunJSSE` (SSL/TLS context factories), and `SunEC` (elliptic curve key/signature algorithms). Each calls `putService()` to register their algorithm implementations. `ProviderConfig` in `sun.
